cases.name: Legacy ambiguous manual-review case
cases.notes: Uses the existing regression fixture with unit-scale conflict and suspicious column swap that should stay blocked from publication.

artifactGeneration.detail: Benchmark uses in-memory legacy document fixtures only.

cases.name: Paired digital happy path
cases.notes: Legacy runs from inline PDF pages, while OpenDataLoader runs from a captured normalized JSON artifact representing the same core statement content.
knownEvidenceLimitations: The captured OpenDataLoader fixture omits the note-level declaration line 'Alle tall i notene er NOK 1.000 ...' that exists in the legacy inline PDF page, so the remaining note-page unit-scale disagreement is evidence-limited rather than a proven parser bug.

artifactGeneration.detail: Benchmark uses in-memory inline PDF pages only.
Benchmark used a captured OpenDataLoader JSON artifact from the repo.

comparisonAssessment.summary: The captured OpenDataLoader fixture omits the note-level declaration line 'Alle tall i notene er NOK 1.000 ...' that exists in the legacy inline PDF page, so the remaining note-page unit-scale disagreement is evidence-limited rather than a proven parser bug.

cases.name: Paired digital live local ODL case
cases.notes: Runs OpenDataLoader live in local mode against a generated benchmark PDF built from the same inline digital pages as the paired happy-path case. Requires Java 11+.
errors: Live local benchmark is not ready: Detected Java 1.8.0_241, but local OpenDataLoader requires Java 11+.

summary.recommendation: keep legacy as default, OpenDataLoader shadow-only
summary.recommendationReason: Repoet har ikke bekreftet lokal OpenDataLoader-runtime i dette miljoet. Java 11+ er ikke klart, sa rollout bor ikke skje utover fixture/shadow-evaluering.
